untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) Price deviation measured in standard deviations below SMA - no standard deviation indicator available; (2) Persistence threshold in days - engine does not support multi-bar lookback conditions without explicit bar indexing; (3) Volume confirmation using specific multiplier - vol_ratio_20 is fixed ratio, not configurable multiplier. The three [THRESHOLD_NEEDED] parameters cannot be determined from source text and no standard deviation indicator exists in allowed list.
translation_notes: Attempted partial translation using close < sma_200 as mean reversion signal and volume confirmation as proxy. However, core requirement for standard deviation bands and persistence duration thresholds cannot be properly expressed without additional indicators (like Bollinger Bands bb_upper/bb_lower for volatility) or configurable volume multipliers. Source text excerpt is incomplete and does not specify the actual threshold values.
